# openai_organization_user_role (Resource)

Assigns a role to a user at the organization level.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Assign an organization role to a user
resource "openai_organization_user_role" "admin" {
  user_id = var.user_id
  role_id = var.role_id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `role_id` (String) The ID of the role to assign.
- `user_id` (String) The ID of the user.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The identifier of the organization user role assignment (user_id:role_id).
